zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Harding於1423年6月16日出生在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Henricus Harding12歲，母親Alice Horton18歲。他於1447年與Elizabeth Del'outhe在英國越可爾曼諾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年在英國格盧斯特斯爾維斯廷頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾比頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Harding于1423年6月16日出生在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，他的父亲Henricus Harding12岁，母亲Alice Horton18岁。他于1447年与Elizabeth Del'outhe在英国越可爾曼諾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年在英国格盧斯特斯爾維斯廷頓享年47岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾比頓。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Harding was born on 16 June 1423, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, his father, Henricus Harding, was 12 and his mother, Alice Horton, was 18. He married Elizabeth Del'outhe in 1447, in Manor, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1470, in Westington, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Bitton, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Harding est né le 16 juin 1423, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Henricus Harding, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Alice Horton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Del'outhe en 1447, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1470, à Westington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Bitton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Harding am 16. Juni 1423 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henricus Harding 12 und seine Mutter Alice Horton 18. Er hat 1447 in Manor, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Del'outhe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Westington, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Bitton, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Del'outhe nel 1447, nel Manor, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Roger Hardingが1423年6月16日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Henricus Hardingは12歳，母Alice Hortonは18歳であった。1447年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーでElizabeth Del'outheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウエスティントンで47歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Harding(이)가 1423년 6월 16일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henricus Harding(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Horton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1447년 영국 요르크실르 먼어에서 Elizabeth Del'outhe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 영국 그루스스터실르 웨스틴그턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 비턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Del'outhe em 1447, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Harding родился 16 июня 1423 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Henricus Harding было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Horton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Del'outhe в 1447 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1470 г. в местности вестингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности биттон, глоусестиршир, Англия.
